title: Modular Inverse
description: Modular inversion is required in Bitcoin signature equations for both key and nonce terms. Understanding inversion clarifies why bad nonce handling can leak private keys.

resources.title: Mastering Bitcoin: Keys and Addresses
resources.notes: Covers inversion in the signature construction flow.

resources.title: BIP 340: Schnorr Signatures
resources.notes: Formal signature equations that rely on modular arithmetic properties.

resources.title: secp256k1 README
resources.notes: Shows implementation details and side-channel considerations around arithmetic operations.
